title: Hamantaschen: The Classic Purim Cookie and Its Symbolism
title_zh: 哈曼塔饼:普珥节经典饼干及其象征意义
description: Recipes for traditional fillings (poppy seed, prune, chocolate) and creative Asian-inspired flavors (red bean, matcha, black sesame).
description_zh: 传统馅料(罂粟籽、李子、巧克力)和创意亚洲风味(豆沙、抹茶、黑芝麻)的食谱。
description_he: מתכונים למילויים מסורתיים (זרעי פרג, שזיפים, שוקולד) וטעמים יצירתיים בהשראה אסיאתית (שעועית אדומה, מאצ'ה, שומשום שחור).
chinese_historical_period: Warring States Period (战国时代, 475-221 BCE)
cultural_parallels: Reversal of fortune similar to Chinese New Year traditions
Food as storytelling (like mooncakes and dumplings)
Community and generosity (similar to hongbao tradition)
Red bean paste as Asian-inspired filling
image_description: Traditional Chinese ink wash (水墨) landscape featuring a scholar's study table arranged for a spring celebration, with triangular pastries, plum blossoms, and scroll paintings depicting the story of Esther in shan shui style.
author: Torah Light Writing Agent
